channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Pentagon denies Hegseth’s broker sought defence investment before Iran war
item.description: US Department of Defense demands retraction of report alleging broker sought multimillion-dollar investment for Hegseth.

item.title: Intense US-Israeli attacks on Iranian city of Isfahan cause column of fire
item.description: Witnesses have captured intense US-Israeli attacks on Isfahan, a city in Iran with a population of 2.3M.

item.title: At least 70 killed, 30 wounded in Haiti gang attack, rights group says
item.description: Death toll by the Defenseurs Plus rights group significantly exceeds ⁠official estimates of 16.

item.title: Al Jazeera’s full interview with Marco Rubio on US war on Iran
item.description: In an exclusive interview, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says Iran war objectives will be achieved 'within weeks'.

item.title: Iran war live: Kuwaiti oil tanker hit in Dubai port; 3 UN troops killed
item.description: Saudi, Qatari, Jordanian leaders meet as Iran continues to retaliate for US-Israeli raids with attacks on Gulf nations.

item.title: Iran’s foreign ministry rejects US ceasefire demands
item.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman says US conditions for a ceasefire are ‘excessive, unrealistic and unreasonable’.

item.title: Key moments from Marco Rubio’s interview with Al Jazeera
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio spoke exclusively to Al Jazeera’s Hashem Ahelbarra about the war on Iran.

item.title: Is a peaceful settlement possible in Iran?
item.description: Pakistan says it is ready to host talks on ending the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: US says Trump ‘interested’ in asking Arab countries to pay for war on Iran
item.description: White House's Karoline Leavitt says passing the conflict's costs off to regional states is 'an idea' Donald Trump has.

item.title: UN condemns killing of Indonesian peacekeepers in Lebanon
item.description: The UN condemned the deaths of three Indonesian peacekeepers in Lebanon, who were killed in two separate incidents.
